'''tovabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoeal|zoeal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-v-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoeal|zoeal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tovabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tovabithi|tovabithi]] || [[word:tovabiji|tovabiji]] || [[word:tovabishi|tovabishi]] || [[word:tovabiki|tovabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tovabuthuthu|tovabuthuthu]] || [[word:tovabujuju|tovabujuju]] || [[word:tovabushushu|tovabushushu]] || [[word:tovabukuku|tovabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tovabuthu|tovabuthu]] || [[word:tovabuju|tovabuju]] || [[word:tovabushu|tovabushu]] || [[word:tovabuku|tovabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tovabufthuf|tovabufthuf]] || [[word:tovabufjuf|tovabufjuf]] || [[word:tovabufshuf|tovabufshuf]] || [[word:tovabufkuf|tovabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tovabethe|tovabethe]] || [[word:tovabeje|tovabeje]] || [[word:tovabeshe|tovabeshe]] || [[word:tovabeke|tovabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tovabothotho|tovabothotho]] || [[word:tovabojojo|tovabojojo]] || [[word:tovaboshosho|tovaboshosho]] || [[word:tovabokoko|tovabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tovabotho|tovabotho]] || [[word:tovabojo|tovabojo]] || [[word:tovabosho|tovabosho]] || [[word:tovaboko|tovaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tovabofthof|tovabofthof]] || [[word:tovabofjof|tovabofjof]] || [[word:tovabofshof|tovabofshof]] || [[word:tovabofkof|tovabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tovabÃŸfthÃŸf|tovabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tovabÃŸfjÃŸf|tovabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tovabÃŸfshÃŸf|tovabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tovabÃŸfkÃŸf|tovabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tovabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|tovabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tovabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|tovabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tovabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|tovabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tovabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|tovabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tovabÃŸfthÃŸf|tovabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tovabÃŸfjÃŸf|tovabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tovabÃŸfshÃŸf|tovabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tovabÃŸfkÃŸf|tovabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tovabÃŸfthÃŸf|tovabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tovabÃŸfjÃŸf|tovabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tovabÃŸfshÃŸf|tovabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tovabÃŸfkÃŸf|tovabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tovabÃḊthÃḊ|tovabÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:tovabÃḊjÃḊ|tovabÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:tovabÃḊshÃḊ|tovabÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:tovabÃḊkÃḊ|tovabÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tovabathatha|tovabathatha]] || [[word:tovabajaja|tovabajaja]] || [[word:tovabashasha|tovabashasha]] || [[word:tovabakaka|tovabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tovabatha|tovabatha]] || [[word:tovabaja|tovabaja]] || [[word:tovabasha|tovabasha]] || [[word:tovabaka|tovabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tovabafthaf|tovabafthaf]] || [[word:tovabafjaf|tovabafjaf]] || [[word:tovabafshaf|tovabafshaf]] || [[word:tovabafkaf|tovabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:tovabasha|tovabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:tovabshÃḋsha|tovabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tovabrosha|tovabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tovabmusha|tovabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:tovabyasha|tovabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotovabnkshÃḋsha|gotovabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotovabnkrosha|gotovabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotovabnkmusha|gotovabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotovabnkyasha|gotovabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:tovavabasha|tovavabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tovavabshÃḋsha|tovavabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tovavabrosha|tovavabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tovavabmusha|tovavabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tovavabyasha|tovavabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotovavabnkshÃḋsha|gotovavabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotovavabnkrosha|gotovavabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotovavabnkmusha|gotovavabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotovavabnkyasha|gotovavabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tevÃḊbasha|tevÃḊbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tevÃḊbshÃḋsha|tevÃḊbshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tevÃḊbrosha|tevÃḊbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tevÃḊbmusha|tevÃḊbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tevÃḊbyasha|tevÃḊbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotevÃḊbnkshÃḋsha|gotevÃḊbnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotevÃḊbnkrosha|gotevÃḊbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotevÃḊbnkmusha|gotevÃḊbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotevÃḊbnkyasha|gotevÃḊbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:tovfabasha|tovfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tovfabshÃḋsha|tovfabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tovfabrosha|tovfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tovfabmusha|tovfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tovfabyasha|tovfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotovfabnkshÃḋsha|gotovfabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotovfabnkrosha|gotovfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotovfabnkmusha|gotovfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotovfabnkyasha|gotovfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
